# byteSourceForRelatedFileName(_:)

**Instance Method**

Creates a new byte source for a related file.

## Declaration

```swift
func byteSourceForRelatedFileName(_ fileName: String) throws -> MEByteSource
```

## Parameters

- **fileName**: The related file name that exists in the byte source’s parent directory.

## Return Value

A byte source.

## Discussion

Requests creation of a new [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource] for a file related to the receiving [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource]. Only file names returned by the [doc://com.apple.mediaextension/documentation/MediaExtension/MEByteSource/relatedFileNamesInSameDirectory] method may be accessed.

## Performing operations on a byte source

- **availableLength(at:)**: Gets the number of available bytes from the offset within the byte source.
- **read(length:from:completionHandler:)**: Reads bytes from a byte source into a data object.
